## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature or capability
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — restructuring, no behaviour change
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, deps, CI config
- [ ] `hotfix` — urgent production fix
